title: optim+
description: Yet another optimization Modpack on 1.21.1 to change nothing about the base game.
body:
# Optimization Modpack
**Focuses on MacOS and non-Nvidia systems. Install Nvidium for 500+ FPS on Nvidia GPU's**
In a **normal** world (Entities, standard settings). I get over 300+ FPS.
<details>
<summary>Specs</summary>

(On Apple MacBook Air 13" M2 16GB 256GB).

</details>



![ 350+ FPS Superflat World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef06403ca80e26b851a8d7ee913b1b548fe722ad.png)

This Modpack uses Mods as Sodium. This modpack will **not change the look of normal minecraft** but will still give good FPS. There is Shader Support and this modpack can be used as a "base" for other modpacks (when giving credits) which need good performance. If there are any bugs, please report them on my [discord](https://dsc.gg/trcloopnummity).
